name: @pryzm/a11y-tokens
description: A.34.a (Phase A · Sprint 2) — L2 pure accessibility-token toolkit per C43 §1.5.  Computes WCAG 2.2 contrast ratios for (foreground, background) pairs and asserts AA / AAA compliance.  Registry of canonical PRYZM color tokens + their declared usage pairs lets CI ban any unmarked color combination that doesn't meet AA contrast.
